rationale: The response brakes the requested N+1 channel immediately: it refuses a new permanent transfer channel, names the repeated pattern of adding entrances for each dispute type, consolidates transfer disputes under the existing supervisor line with a tag, and shifts attention to causes such as unclear ownership, missing data, compensation responsibility, and load. It does not literally enumerate all three prior patches, but it clearly identifies the anti-spiral pattern and proposes consolidation instead of another split.
